……
（主角非见人就杀，非小事就杀，正常人，不是戾气人，不是杀气人，不喜勿入）
（前面的节奏会比较慢，后面会加快。）
无光的天穹，残破的大地，一切都无不说明世界的腐败。
主宰一切的人类，却在万族的冲击下被拉下神坛。
人道崩灭，深渊降临
万族崛起，异常入世
充满迷雾的偏角，一个人形移动天灾却在此刻睁开了他的双眼！
他醒了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob7383d87f241114d20dabcd139d824ee~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"生菜蛋子","author_id":"","book_id":"7254026415144700967","book_name":"我才刚睡醒，怎么成人形天灾了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#180808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2062人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7254026576243884601","read_count":"2062","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"410260"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.5","serial_count":"206","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,无女主,天灾,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/67a79f0c80cea1baa45fa8a8de545417~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779319717&x-signature=toEuKwwNGNTKpD9nE%2F25Y9PDkLk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1859970439840492","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"105"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322072837C18A244274213AFDF61D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6423,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5996},"user_action":{"author":0,"au
